repo_prior_art.cite: none; doc/API.md §1 contains linear FWL/sign-flip panel stacks, not an effect-dependent PPML pseudo-true derivative identity.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT §3.1, equation (3.6) gives the two-individual, three-period PPML wrong-comparison calculation, but not this general cohort-and-time-projection derivative formula.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue proposal eliminates PPML pseudo-true margins into a primitive multicohort sign frontier.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT §3.1 gives a 2x3 calculation; GoodmanBacon2021 and deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2020TWFE concern linear-TWFE decompositions, not a finite primitive characterization of the nonlinear PPML zero-level set.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1 / comparator_promise_table
novelty_flags.one_line: The promise table labels deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2020TWFE as an iff-frontier match, but no statement establishes a strict tightening, equivalence frontier, or non-representability result against that paper's linear estimator; downgrade it to informed-by or add the comparison.

soundness_flags.label: ass:multiplicative-parallel-trends and def:weighted-fwl-residual
soundness_flags.one_line: With no intercept in Z_gt, simultaneously fixing a_infinity0=0 and gamma_10=0 restricts B_infinity,1=1 rather than merely normalizing standard multiplicative parallel trends.

soundness_flags.label: prop:four-cohort-sign-reversal
soundness_flags.one_line: For the declared no-intercept Z_gt, the displayed residual table is false: at W4 and delta=0, Wtilde_2,4=-1/14 rather than -1/8; the shown matrix is the projection that includes an intercept.

soundness_flags.label: def:sample-pooled-ppml and lem:pseudo-true-ppml-projection
soundness_flags.one_line: The sample argmax need not exist on zero/separation realizations permitted by the nonnegative-outcome model, so hat_theta_N is not a random vector without an existence convention or a condition proving such events asymptotically negligible.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add an intercept to the PPML and FWL designs, retain only one fixed-effect normalization, and recompute the W4 residual table and witness under that same specification.
Make the sample PPML parameter total by specifying an extended-value/separation convention or impose and prove a finite-sample existence condition compatible with the triangular-array model.

Either relabel deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2020TWFE as informed-by or add a theorem that strictly separates its linear-weight result from the nonlinear PPML derivative diagnostic; pairing this with MoreauKastler2025PTT would create a real comparator chain.

recommended_next_step: Continue revision: repair the fixed-effect normalization/design and sample-estimator definition, then align the de Chaisemartin comparator promise with an actual comparative statement or downgrade it.
